summary: Parent Dashboard AI-Evaluated Tests Integration Bug Fix VERIFIED. The `/api/student/parent-dashboard` endpoint now correctly returns AI test scores from StructuredTestSubmission joined with StructuredTest tables alongside old TestSubmission data. All 10 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI displays AI test scores (43.8% Hindi, 66.7% Math, 0% Computer), performance charts, and correct classification badges (NEEDS IMPROVEMENT, AVERAGE).

issues: Computer subject shows N/A for Average Score instead of 0% - minor display inconsistency

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing AI test submissions for student S3
context_for_next_testing_agent: Parent Dashboard bug fix verified. Student S3 (Krutika) has AI test data: Hindi=43.8% (weak), Computer=0% (weak), Mathematics=66.7% (average). The backend joins StructuredTestSubmission with StructuredTest to get AI test scores. Frontend ParentDashboard.jsx renders PerformanceChart for subjects with test_performance data.

backend_tests.test_parent_dashboard_test_performance_s: PASSED - test_name, date, percentage fields present
backend_tests.test_parent_dashboard_subject_structure: PASSED - All required fields present per subject

overall_stats.description: Tests Taken, Avg Score, HW Done stats visible in header

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Parent Dashboard was not showing scores of AI-evaluated tests and not showing their graphs
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Backend endpoint `/api/student/parent-dashboard` updated to query StructuredTestSubmission joined with StructuredTest to include AI-evaluated test data
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: VERIFIED - AI test scores now appear in test_performance array with correct percentages and classifications
